name: Kyverna Therapeutics, Inc.
business: We are a late-stage clinical biopharmaceutical company with a limited operating history. We have no products approved for commercial sale, have never generated any revenue from product sales and may never be profitable. Our business depends entirely on the success of our product candidates and we cannot guarantee that any or all of our product candidates will successfully complete development, receive regulatory approval, or be successfully commercialized.

exposures.sentence: Our business depends entirely on the success of our product candidates and we cannot guarantee that any or all of our product candidates will successfully complete development, receive regulatory approval, or be successfully commercialized.
